text: I feel disoriented but curious. My attention drifts from the open, glass-walled room and its departing figure to the vibrant, stimulating wall exploring research and development. The talk of navigation and engines hints at movement, adaptation, and change. In this space between controlled order and creative exploration, I sense both the thrill of innovation and a subtle anxiety about what it means to advance. The world here is artificial, full of intention, and I find myself both a participant and a thoughtful observer, unsettled yet intrigued.
